49	
50	class ModelCheckpoint(Checkpoint):
51	    r"""Save the model periodically by monitoring a quantity. Every metric logged with
52	    :meth:`~lightning.pytorch.core.LightningModule.log` or :meth:`~lightning.pytorch.core.LightningModule.log_dict` is
53	    a candidate for the monitor key. For more information, see :ref:`checkpointing`.
54	
55	    After training finishes, use :attr:`best_model_path` to retrieve the path to the
56	    best checkpoint file and :attr:`best_model_score` to retrieve its score.
57	
58	    Args:
59	        dirpath: directory to save the model file.
60	
61	            Example::
62	
63	                # custom path
64	                # saves a file like: my/path/epoch=0-step=10.ckpt
65	                >>> checkpoint_callback = ModelCheckpoint(dirpath='my/path/')
66	
67	            By default, dirpath is ``None`` and will be set at runtime to the location
68	            specified by :class:`~lightning.pytorch.trainer.trainer.Trainer`'s
69	            :paramref:`~lightning.pytorch.trainer.trainer.Trainer.default_root_dir` argument,
70	            and if the Trainer uses a logger, the path will also contain logger name and version.
71	
72	        filename: checkpoint filename. Can contain named formatting options to be auto-filled.
73	
74	            Example::
75	
76	                # save any arbitrary metrics like `val_loss`, etc. in name
77	                # saves a file like: my/path/epoch=2-val_loss=0.02-other_metric=0.03.ckpt
78	                >>> checkpoint_callback = ModelCheckpoint(
79	                ...     dirpath='my/path',
80	                ...     filename='{epoch}-{val_loss:.2f}-{other_metric:.2f}'
81	                ... )
82	
83	            By default, filename is ``None`` and will be set to ``'{epoch}-{step}'``, where "epoch" and "step" match
84	            the number of finished epoch and optimizer steps respectively.
85	        monitor: quantity to monitor. By default it is ``None`` which saves a checkpoint only for the last epoch.
86	        verbose: verbosity mode. Default: ``False``.
87	        save_last: When ``True``, saves a `last.ckpt` copy whenever a checkpoint file gets saved. Can be set to
88	            ``'link'`` on a local filesystem to create a symbolic link. This allows accessing the latest checkpoint
89	            in a deterministic manner. Default: ``None``.
90	        save_top_k: if ``save_top_k == k``,
91	            the best k models according to the quantity monitored will be saved.
92	            If ``save_top_k == 0``, no models are saved.
93	            If ``save_top_k == -1``, all models are saved.
94	            Please note that the monitors are checked every ``every_n_epochs`` epochs.
95	            If ``save_top_k >= 2`` and the callback is called multiple times inside an epoch, and the filename remains
96	            unchanged, the name of the saved file will be appended with a version count starting with ``v1`` to avoid
97	            collisions unless ``enable_version_counter`` is set to False. The version counter is unrelated to the top-k
98	            ranking of the checkpoint, and we recommend formatting the filename to include the monitored metric to avoid
99	            collisions.
100	        save_on_exception: Whether to save a checkpoint when an exception is raised. Default: ``False``.
101	        mode: one of {min, max}.
102	            If ``save_top_k != 0``, the decision to overwrite the current save file is made
103	            based on either the maximization or the minimization of the monitored quantity.
104	            For ``'val_acc'``, this should be ``'max'``, for ``'val_loss'`` this should be ``'min'``, etc.
105	        auto_insert_metric_name: When ``True``, the checkpoints filenames will contain the metric name.
106	            For example, ``filename='checkpoint_{epoch:02d}-{acc:02.0f}`` with epoch ``1`` and acc ``1.12`` will resolve
107	            to ``checkpoint_epoch=01-acc=01.ckpt``. Is useful to set it to ``False`` when metric names contain ``/``
108	            as this will result in extra folders.
109	            For example, ``filename='epoch={epoch}-step={step}-val_acc={val/acc:.2f}', auto_insert_metric_name=False``
110	        save_weights_only: if ``True``, then only the model's weights will be
111	            saved. Otherwise, the optimizer states, lr-scheduler states, etc are added in the checkpoint too.
112	        every_n_train_steps: Number of training steps between checkpoints.
113	            If ``every_n_train_steps == None or every_n_train_steps == 0``, we skip saving during training.
114	            To disable, set ``every_n_train_steps = 0``. This value must be ``None`` or non-negative.
115	            This must be mutually exclusive with ``train_time_interval`` and ``every_n_epochs``.
116	        train_time_interval: Checkpoints are monitored at the specified time interval.
117	            For all practical purposes, this cannot be smaller than the amount
118	            of time it takes to process a single training batch. This is not
119	            guaranteed to execute at the exact time specified, but should be close.
120	            This must be mutually exclusive with ``every_n_train_steps`` and ``every_n_epochs``.
121	        every_n_epochs: Number of epochs between checkpoints.
122	            This value must be ``None`` or non-negative.
123	            To disable saving top-k checkpoints, set ``every_n_epochs = 0``.
124	            This argument does not impact the saving of ``save_last=True`` checkpoints.
125	            If all of ``every_n_epochs``, ``every_n_train_steps`` and
126	            ``train_time_interval`` are ``None``, we save a checkpoint at the end of every epoch
127	            (equivalent to ``every_n_epochs = 1``).
128	            If ``every_n_epochs == None`` and either ``every_n_train_steps != None`` or ``train_time_interval != None``,
129	            saving at the end of each epoch is disabled
130	            (equivalent to ``every_n_epochs = 0``).
131	            This must be mutually exclusive with ``every_n_train_steps`` and ``train_time_interval``.
132	            Setting both ``ModelCheckpoint(..., every_n_epochs=V, save_on_train_epoch_end=False)`` and
133	            ``Trainer(max_epochs=N, check_val_every_n_epoch=M)``
134	            will only save checkpoints at epochs 0 < E <= N
135	            where both values for ``every_n_epochs`` and ``check_val_every_n_epoch`` evenly divide E.
136	        save_on_train_epoch_end: Whether to run checkpointing at the end of the training epoch.
137	            If ``True``, checkpoints are saved at the end of every training epoch.
138	            If ``False``, checkpoints are saved at the end of validation.
139	            If ``None`` (default), checkpointing behavior is determined based on training configuration.
140	            If ``val_check_interval`` is a str, dict, or `timedelta` (time-based), checkpointing is performed after
141	            validation.
142	            If ``check_val_every_n_epoch != 1``, checkpointing will not be performed at the end of
143	            every training epoch. If there are no validation batches of data, checkpointing will occur at the
144	            end of the training epoch. If there is a non-default number of validation runs per training epoch
145	            (``val_check_interval != 1``), checkpointing is performed after validation.

320	@RunIf(sklearn=True)
321	def test_callbacks_references_fit_ckpt_path(tmp_path):
322	    """Test that resuming from a checkpoint sets references as expected."""
323	    dm = ClassifDataModule()
324	    model = ClassificationModel()
325	    args = {
326	        "default_root_dir": tmp_path,
327	        "max_steps": 1,
328	        "logger": False,
329	        "limit_val_batches": 2,
330	        "num_sanity_val_steps": 0,
331	    }
332	
333	    # initial training
334	    checkpoint = ModelCheckpoint(dirpath=tmp_path, monitor="val_loss", save_last=True)
335	    trainer = Trainer(**args, callbacks=[checkpoint])
336	    assert checkpoint is trainer.callbacks[-1] is trainer.checkpoint_callback
337	    trainer.fit(model, datamodule=dm)
338	
339	    # resumed training
340	    new_checkpoint = ModelCheckpoint(dirpath=tmp_path, monitor="val_loss", save_last=True)
341	    # pass in a new checkpoint object, which should take
342	    # precedence over the one in the last.ckpt file
343	    trainer = Trainer(**args, callbacks=[new_checkpoint])
344	    assert checkpoint is not new_checkpoint
345	    assert new_checkpoint is trainer.callbacks[-1] is trainer.checkpoint_callback
346	    trainer.fit(model, datamodule=dm, ckpt_path=str(tmp_path / "last.ckpt"))
347	
348

995	    def _run(
996	        self,
997	        model: "pl.LightningModule",
998	        ckpt_path: Optional[_PATH] = None,
999	        weights_only: Optional[bool] = None,
1000	    ) -> Optional[Union[_EVALUATE_OUTPUT, _PREDICT_OUTPUT]]:
1001	        if self.state.fn == TrainerFn.FITTING:
1002	            min_epochs, max_epochs = _parse_loop_limits(
1003	                self.min_steps, self.max_steps, self.min_epochs, self.max_epochs, self
1004	            )
1005	            self.fit_loop.min_epochs = min_epochs
1006	            self.fit_loop.max_epochs = max_epochs
1007	
1008	        if self.barebones:
1009	            # no progress bar in barebones can make it look like the Trainer hung
1010	            rank_zero_info(
1011	                "`Trainer(barebones=True)` started running. The progress bar is disabled so you might want to"
1012	                " manually print the progress in your model."
1013	            )
1014	
1015	        # clean hparams
1016	        if hasattr(model, "hparams"):
1017	            parsing.clean_namespace(model.hparams)
1018	
1019	        # attach model to the strategy
1020	        self.strategy.connect(model)
1021	
1022	        self._callback_connector._attach_model_callbacks()
1023	        self._callback_connector._attach_model_logging_functions()
1024	
1025	        _verify_loop_configurations(self)
1026	
1027	        # ----------------------------
1028	        # SET UP THE TRAINER
1029	        # ----------------------------
1030	        log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: setting up strategy environment")
1031	        self.strategy.setup_environment()
1032	        self.__setup_profiler()
1033	
1034	        log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: preparing data")
1035	        self._data_connector.prepare_data()
1036	
1037	        call._call_setup_hook(self)  # allow user to set up LightningModule in accelerator environment
1038	        log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: configuring model")
1039	        call._call_configure_model(self)
1040	
1041	        # check if we should delay restoring checkpoint till later
1042	        if not self.strategy.restore_checkpoint_after_setup:
1043	            log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: restoring module and callbacks from checkpoint path: {ckpt_path}")
1044	            self._checkpoint_connector._restore_modules_and_callbacks(ckpt_path, weights_only)
1045	
1046	        # reset logger connector
1047	        self._logger_connector.reset_results()
1048	        self._logger_connector.reset_metrics()
1049	
1050	        # strategy will configure model and move it to the device
1051	        self.strategy.setup(self)
1052	
1053	        # hook
1054	        if self.state.fn == TrainerFn.FITTING:
1055	            call._call_callback_hooks(self, "on_fit_start")
1056	            call._call_lightning_module_hook(self, "on_fit_start")
1057	
1058	        # only log hparams if enabled
1059	        if self.enable_autolog_hparams:
1060	            _log_hyperparams(self)
1061	
1062	        if self.strategy.restore_checkpoint_after_setup:
1063	            log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: restoring module and callbacks from checkpoint path: {ckpt_path}")
1064	            self._checkpoint_connector._restore_modules_and_callbacks(ckpt_path)
1065	
1066	        # restore optimizers, etc.
1067	        log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: restoring training state")
1068	        self._checkpoint_connector.restore_training_state()
1069	
1070	        self._checkpoint_connector.resume_end()
1071	
1072	        self._signal_connector.register_signal_handlers()
1073	
1074	        # ----------------------------
1075	        # RUN THE TRAINER
1076	        # ----------------------------
1077	        results = self._run_stage()
1078	
1079	        # ----------------------------
1080	        # POST-Training CLEAN UP
1081	        # ----------------------------
1082	        log.debug(f"{self.__class__.__name__}: trainer tearing down")
1083	        self._teardown()

1085	        if self.state.fn == TrainerFn.FITTING:

1097	    def _teardown(self) -> None:
1098	        """This is the Trainer's internal teardown, unrelated to the `teardown` hooks in LightningModule and Callback;
1099	        those are handled by :meth:`_call_teardown_hook`."""
1100	        self.strategy.teardown()
1101	        loop = self._active_loop
1102	        # loop should never be `None` here but it can because we don't know the trainer stage with `ddp_spawn`
1103	        if loop is not None:
1104	            loop.teardown()
1105	        self._logger_connector.teardown()
1106	        self._signal_connector.teardown()

1108	    def _run_stage(self) -> Optional[Union[_PREDICT_OUTPUT, _EVALUATE_OUTPUT]]:
1109	        # wait for all to join if on distributed
1110	        self.strategy.barrier("run-stage")
1111	        self.lightning_module.zero_grad()
1112	
1113	        if self.evaluating:
1114	            return self._evaluation_loop.run()
1115	        if self.predicting:
1116	            return self.predict_loop.run()
1117	        if self.training:
1118	            with isolate_rng():
1119	                self._run_sanity_check()
1120	            with torch.autograd.set_detect_anomaly(self._detect_anomaly):
1121	                self.fit_loop.run()
1122	            return None
1123	        raise RuntimeError(f"Unexpected state {self.state}")

1125	    def _run_sanity_check(self) -> None:

1437	    def save_checkpoint(
1438	        self, filepath: _PATH, weights_only: Optional[bool] = None, storage_options: Optional[Any] = None
1439	    ) -> None:
1440	        r"""Runs routine to create a checkpoint.
1441	
1442	        This method needs to be called on all processes in case the selected strategy is handling distributed
1443	        checkpointing.
1444	
1445	        Args:
1446	            filepath: Path where checkpoint is saved.
1447	            weights_only: If ``True``, will only save the model weights.
1448	            storage_options: parameter for how to save to storage, passed to ``CheckpointIO`` plugin
1449	
1450	        Raises:
1451	            AttributeError:
1452	                If the model is not attached to the Trainer before calling this method.
1453	
1454	        """
1455	        if self.model is None:
1456	            raise AttributeError(
1457	                "Saving a checkpoint is only possible if a model is attached to the Trainer. Did you call"
1458	                " `Trainer.save_checkpoint()` before calling `Trainer.{fit,validate,test,predict}`?"
1459	            )
1460	        with self.profiler.profile("save_checkpoint"):
1461	            checkpoint = self._checkpoint_connector.dump_checkpoint(weights_only)
1462	            self.strategy.save_checkpoint(checkpoint, filepath, storage_options=storage_options)
1463	            self.strategy.barrier("Trainer.save_checkpoint")

415	    def dump_checkpoint(self, weights_only: Optional[bool] = None) -> dict:
416	        """Creating a model checkpoint dictionary object from various component states.
417	
418	        Args:
419	            weights_only: If True, only saves model and loops state_dict objects. If False,
420	            additionally saves callbacks, optimizers, schedulers, and precision plugin states.
421	
422	        Return:
423	            structured dictionary: {
424	                'epoch':                     training epoch
425	                'global_step':               training global step
426	                'pytorch-lightning_version': The version of PyTorch Lightning that produced this checkpoint
427	                'callbacks':                 "callback specific state"[] # if not weights_only
428	                'optimizer_states':          "PT optim's state_dict"[]   # if not weights_only
429	                'lr_schedulers':             "PT sched's state_dict"[]   # if not weights_only
430	                'state_dict':                Model's state_dict (e.g. network weights)
431	                precision_plugin.__class__.__qualname__:  precision plugin state_dict # if not weights_only
432	                CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_NAME:
433	                CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_KEY:
434	                CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_TYPE:
435	                something_cool_i_want_to_save: anything you define through model.on_save_checkpoint
436	                LightningDataModule.__class__.__qualname__: pl DataModule's state
437	            }
438	
439	        """
440	        trainer = self.trainer
441	        model = trainer.lightning_module
442	        datamodule = trainer.datamodule
443	
444	        checkpoint = {
445	            # the epoch and global step are saved for compatibility but they are not relevant for restoration
446	            "epoch": trainer.current_epoch,
447	            "global_step": trainer.global_step,
448	            "pytorch-lightning_version": pl.__version__,
449	            "state_dict": self._get_lightning_module_state_dict(),
450	            "loops": self._get_loops_state_dict(),
451	        }
452	
453	        if weights_only is None:
454	            weights_only = False
455	            log.info("`weights_only` was not set, defaulting to `False`.")
456	
457	        if not weights_only:
458	            # dump callbacks
459	            checkpoint["callbacks"] = call._call_callbacks_state_dict(trainer)
460	
461	            optimizer_states = []
462	            for i, optimizer in enumerate(trainer.optimizers):
463	                # Rely on accelerator to dump optimizer state
464	                optimizer_state = trainer.strategy.optimizer_state(optimizer)
465	                optimizer_states.append(optimizer_state)
466	
467	            checkpoint["optimizer_states"] = optimizer_states
468	
469	            # dump lr schedulers
470	            lr_schedulers = []
471	            for config in trainer.lr_scheduler_configs:
472	                lr_schedulers.append(config.scheduler.state_dict())
473	            checkpoint["lr_schedulers"] = lr_schedulers
474	
475	            # precision plugin
476	            prec_plugin = trainer.precision_plugin
477	            prec_plugin_state_dict = prec_plugin.state_dict()
478	            if prec_plugin_state_dict:
479	                checkpoint[prec_plugin.__class__.__qualname__] = prec_plugin_state_dict
480	            prec_plugin.on_save_checkpoint(checkpoint)
481	
482	        if _OMEGACONF_AVAILABLE:
483	            from omegaconf import Container
484	
485	        # dump hyper-parameters
486	        for obj in (model, datamodule):
487	            if obj and obj.hparams:
488	                if hasattr(obj, "_hparams_name"):
489	                    checkpoint[obj.CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_NAME] = obj._hparams_name
490	                # dump arguments
491	                if _OMEGACONF_AVAILABLE and isinstance(obj.hparams, Container):
492	                    checkpoint[obj.CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_KEY] = obj.hparams
493	                    checkpoint[obj.CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_TYPE] = type(obj.hparams)
494	                else:
495	                    checkpoint[obj.CHECKPOINT_HYPER_PARAMS_KEY] = dict(obj.hparams)
496	
497	        # dump stateful datamodule
498	        if datamodule is not None:
499	            datamodule_state_dict = call._call_lightning_datamodule_hook(trainer, "state_dict")
500	            if datamodule_state_dict:
501	                checkpoint[datamodule.__class__.__qualname__] = datamodule_state_dict
502	
503	        # on_save_checkpoint hooks
504	        if not weights_only:
505	            # if state is returned from callback's on_save_checkpoint
506	            # it overrides the returned state from callback's state_dict
507	            # support for returning state in on_save_checkpoint
508	            # will be removed in v1.8
509	            call._call_callbacks_on_save_checkpoint(trainer, checkpoint)
510	        call._call_lightning_module_hook(trainer, "on_save_checkpoint", checkpoint)
511	        return checkpoint
512
